untranslatable_reason: Megaphone pattern requires detection of diverging trend lines (top sloping up, bottom sloping down), higher highs/lower lows formation, and 5-point reversal identification. These require advanced pattern recognition, linear regression fitting, and local extrema detection which are not supported by the allowed indicator set. Only volume trend (upward) and context (intermediate uptrend) can be approximated with available indicators.
translation_notes: Pattern detection requires custom logic: (1) Identify 3 peaks and 2 troughs forming megaphone shape, (2) Fit trend lines to confirm divergence, (3) Validate volume U-shape. The conditions provided represent entry into an uptrend with elevated volume as a proxy for pattern formation context, but true megaphone identification requires algorithmic pattern recognition beyond this indicator framework.
